name: Lavender Rose Mousse
recipeIngredient: a few drops of red food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lavender and rose petals gently and place them in a pan.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until the petals lose color.
3. Remove the petals from the water and return the water to a boil. Continue boiling until reduced to 1½ cups of liquid.
4. Add sugar and gelatin; stir until dissolved.
5. Remove from heat and let stand until cooled to room temperature.
6. Beat whipping cream until stiff and add to rose water.
7. Mix well, adding a few drops of food coloring if desired.
8. Pour into jello mold or individual cups. Refrigerate until set.
9. Melt chocolate in a double boiler.
10. Unmold mousse and decorate with dribbled chocolate or chocolate leaves and rose petals.
